brief: Market / Portal feature post for VOIDBORN — "Surgical Shopping". Skip the noise. Filter the catalog, zero in on the missing link, and buy exactly the piece your curve has been begging for. Thousands of listings live right now—find the card that completes your next list. Explain: log in → Portal → Market tab → browse player listings and catalog, filter by domain/rarity, buy with credits. In-game credits economy (no real-money P2P). Instagram hype + link in bio; Facebook walkthrough; Discord steps + https://voidborn.fun.

image.prompt: A mystical, dark fantasy marketplace interior, stone arches with glowing elemental carvings, holographic spectral cards floating in the air, cinematic lighting, dark fantasy aesthetic, no text, no logo.
